data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Post-experience photo sharing', which is mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality of sharing photos post-experience through an API or any persisted state checks. The evidence only describes that photos are shared to a group album post-tour but does not confirm the existence of an API endpoint or mechanism that supports this functionality, leading to a clear gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence of an API or mechanism for post-experience photo sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify photo sharing functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system allows sharing of photos to a group album after the experience.
